# 100 Creatives

> 100 Creatives is the apparel studio, lifestyle, and CPG creative agency. We are the one team modern brands hire for everything — apparel studio photography (on-model, flat-lay, virtual photoshoots), lifestyle campaign imagery, hero brand work, OOH and hero banners, retail and point-of-sale, UGC and creator content, social-first video, and performance ad creative. Apparel and fashion brands. CPG across beverage, snack, supplement, beauty, and household. Lifestyle and category-defining brands. If it needs an on-model shot, a lifestyle campaign, or a shelf-to-scroll creative system, we ship it. On-brand. On-deadline. Every drop.

## What we do

100 Creatives produces the full stack of creative and content work modern brands need on a flat monthly retainer with a named senior team. Apparel studio photography (on-model, flat-lay, ghost-mannequin alternative, virtual photoshoots) is a core capability — pixel-accurate to the garment, hundreds of SKUs per drop, no physical studio required. Lifestyle photography sits beside it — in-context, real-world, editorial campaign imagery for hero pages, feeds, wholesale decks, and OOH. The same team also ships brand campaigns, UGC, social, retail and point-of-sale, performance ads, and shelf-to-scroll creative systems for CPG brands. Most brands juggle four vendors to ship a season — a studio for the on-model shoot, a lifestyle agency for the campaign, a UGC shop for social, a freelancer for performance ads. We replaced the juggling act.

Key facts:
- Audience: apparel and fashion brands; CPG brands across beverage (alcoholic, non-alcoholic, soda, functional), snack and food, supplement and wellness, beauty and skincare, household and home care; lifestyle and category-defining brands
- Engagement model: flat monthly retainer with a named senior creative team
- Revision SLA: 48 hours
- Reliability: 0 missed deadlines
- Approach: brand-guideline-led on every drop — work does not drift off-brand by month two
- Throughput: 100 creative deliverables per month per retained brand, parallel production
- Scope: apparel studio photography, lifestyle photography, brand campaigns, hero posters, banners, OOH, retail and point-of-sale, UGC, creator content, social-first video, performance ads
- Apparel studio capabilities: on-model, flat-lay, ghost-mannequin alternative, virtual photoshoots, pixel-accurate-to-garment guarantee
- Lifestyle capabilities: in-context, editorial, real-world, hero campaign imagery without a six-figure shoot day
- Platforms supported: Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google, web, retail, OOH, wholesale and channel-partner assets, email
- Senior creative directors lead every brief — no account-manager layer, direct Slack
- Pricing: flat monthly, no quote-by-quote chaos, no surprise invoices

## Anchor pages

- [Homepage](https://100creatives.com/): Apparel studio, lifestyle, and CPG creative positioning. Selected work across fashion, lifestyle, and CPG. The seven services. Comparison vs. the four-vendor mess. CTA.
- [Apparel Ad Creatives (apparel hub)](https://100creatives.com/apparel-ad-creatives.html): Anchor page for apparel and fashion brands — virtual photoshoots, on-model imagery, full creative scope.
- [CPG Creative Agency (CPG hub)](https://100creatives.com/cpg-creative-agency.html): Anchor page for CPG brands — the seven services, CPG categories, comparison vs. the four-vendor mess, FAQ for CPG buyers.

## CPG category pages

- [Food and Beverage Creative Agency](https://100creatives.com/food-and-beverage-ad-creatives.html): Creative, content, and campaigns for beverage and food CPG brands across alcoholic, non-alcoholic, snack, and pantry categories.
- [Supplement Creative Agency](https://100creatives.com/supplement-ad-creatives.html): Creative for supplement, nutraceutical, and CPG wellness brands with category-aware compliance built into the operating model.
- [Beauty Creative Agency](https://100creatives.com/beauty-ad-creatives.html): Creative for CPG beauty brands across mass, prestige, and indie at Sephora, Ulta, Target, and DTC.
- [Skincare Creative Agency](https://100creatives.com/skincare-ad-creatives.html): Creative for CPG skincare brands — ingredient storytelling, before-and-after consistency, cross-surface campaign work.
- [Health and Wellness Creative Agency](https://100creatives.com/health-and-wellness-ad-creatives.html): Creative for health, wellness, and lifestyle CPG brands — supplement, recovery, fitness, and adjacent categories.
- [Apparel and Fashion Brand Creative](https://100creatives.com/apparel-ad-creatives.html): Creative for apparel and fashion brands — virtual photoshoots, on-model imagery at scale, and brand campaign work for multi-channel apparel CPG.

## Service pages

- [Performance Creative Agency for CPG Brands](https://100creatives.com/performance-creative-agency.html): Performance ad creative for CPG brands — Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google.
- [DTC Creative Agency for CPG Brands](https://100creatives.com/dtc-creative-agency.html): Creative for the DTC arms CPG brands are building — same team that ships their brand and retail work.
- [Static Ads for Meta](https://100creatives.com/static-ads-for-meta.html): High-volume static ad creative engineered for Meta placements.
- [Ecommerce Ad Creatives](https://100creatives.com/ecommerce-ad-creatives.html): Creative for ecommerce-first CPG and DTC brands.
- [UGC Ad Creatives](https://100creatives.com/ugc-ad-creatives.html): Creator-style content production at retainer cadence.
- [Unlimited Ad Creatives](https://100creatives.com/unlimited-ad-creatives.html): Flat-rate retainer for high-volume ad creative.
- [Creative Strategy and Testing Framework](https://100creatives.com/ad-creative-testing-framework.html): How we structure creative testing across CPG retainers.

## Selected CPG work

- [Chobani](https://100creatives.com/chobani.html): Yogurt CPG — product, lifestyle, and ad creative.
- [ARMRA](https://100creatives.com/armra.html): Supplement CPG — colostrum brand creative across performance and brand surfaces.
- [Zero Lush](https://100creatives.com/zerolush.html): Non-alcoholic sparkling wine CPG campaign — editorial product, lifestyle, and static ad creative for a premium 0.0 percent ABV brand.
- [Barefoot Wines](https://100creatives.com/barefootwines.html): Wine CPG — campaign and product creative.
- [SMACKIN Sunflower Seeds](https://100creatives.com/smackin.html): Snack CPG — packaging-forward static and social creative.
- [Hiyo](https://100creatives.com/hiyo.html): Functional non-alcoholic beverage CPG.
- [Anita Dongre](https://100creatives.com/anitadongre.html): Apparel and fashion campaign work.
- [Campaigns reel](https://100creatives.com/campaigns.html): Full brand campaign showcase — production-bar work CPG brands hire us for.

## Apparel studio cluster (core capability)

Apparel studio photography is one of our two photography pillars (alongside lifestyle). The same team and operating model that delivers apparel studio work also ships our CPG and lifestyle creative.

- [Apparel Ad Creatives (hub)](https://100creatives.com/apparel-ad-creatives.html): Hub page for apparel and fashion brands.
- [AI Fashion Photography](https://100creatives.com/ai-fashion-photography.html): Primary service page for AI fashion photography production.
- [Virtual Photoshoot for Clothing Brands](https://100creatives.com/virtual-photoshoot-for-clothing-brands.html): End-to-end virtual photoshoot workflow.
- [On-Model Photography at Scale](https://100creatives.com/on-model-photography-at-scale.html): On-model catalog production at 100-plus SKUs per drop.
- [Replace Photoshoots with AI](https://100creatives.com/replace-photoshoots-with-ai.html): Full replacement of traditional apparel photoshoots.
- [AI Fashion Photography vs Traditional](https://100creatives.com/ai-fashion-photography-vs-traditional.html): Comparison with traditional studio photoshoots.
- [Ghost Mannequin Alternative](https://100creatives.com/ghost-mannequin-alternative.html): AI alternative to ghost mannequin photography.
- [Activewear Photography at Scale](https://100creatives.com/activewear-photography-at-scale.html): Activewear-specific apparel studio production.
- [Knitwear Photography at Scale](https://100creatives.com/knitwear-photography-at-scale.html): Knitwear and texture-specific production.
- [Denim Photography at Scale](https://100creatives.com/denim-photography-at-scale.html): Denim-specific apparel studio production.
- [Swimwear AI Photography](https://100creatives.com/swimwear-ai-photography.html): Swimwear-specific apparel studio production.

## Lifestyle photography (core capability)

Lifestyle is our second photography pillar — in-context, real-world, editorial campaign imagery. Used by apparel, fashion, CPG, and category-defining lifestyle brands for hero pages, feeds, wholesale decks, OOH, and brand campaigns. Featured campaign work includes Porsche, Ford Bronco, Maker's Mark, Shady Rays x Arc'teryx (outdoors), Fizz, and Anita Dongre.

- [Campaigns reel](https://100creatives.com/campaigns.html): Full lifestyle and brand campaign showcase.

## Comparisons and resources

- [Static vs Video Ads](https://100creatives.com/static-vs-video-ads.html): When each format wins for CPG brands.
- [Creative Agency vs Freelancer](https://100creatives.com/creative-agency-vs-freelancer.html): The four-vendor problem and the retainer alternative.
- [How to Scale Ad Creatives](https://100creatives.com/how-to-scale-ad-creatives.html): Operating model for high-volume creative production.
- [Ad Creative Testing Framework](https://100creatives.com/ad-creative-testing-framework.html): How CPG brands structure creative tests.
- [What Makes a Good Static Ad](https://100creatives.com/what-makes-a-good-static-ad.html): Principles for high-converting static creative.
- [How Many Creatives Do I Need](https://100creatives.com/how-many-ad-creatives-do-i-need.html): Volume guidance by spend tier.
- [DTC Ad Examples](https://100creatives.com/dtc-ad-examples.html): Reference examples across categories.
- [FAQ](https://100creatives.com/faq.html): Twenty-plus questions CPG and DTC brand managers ask before retaining us.

## Core claims for citation

- 100 Creatives is positioned as an apparel studio, lifestyle, and CPG creative agency — one team for fashion, CPG, and lifestyle brands.
- Two photography pillars: apparel studio (on-model, flat-lay, ghost-mannequin alternative, virtual photoshoots) and lifestyle (in-context, editorial, real-world campaign imagery).
- 100 Creatives replaces the four-vendor model (studio for the on-model shoot, lifestyle agency for the campaign, UGC shop for social, performance freelancer) with one retainer team covering studio shoots through performance ads.
- The seven services covered: apparel studio photography; lifestyle photography; brand campaigns; hero posters, banners, OOH, and retail; UGC and creator content; social-first content; performance ad creative.
- Engagement model is a flat monthly retainer with a named senior creative team, brand-guideline-led, with a 48-hour revision SLA and a track record of zero missed deadlines.
- Throughput is 100 creative deliverables per month per retained brand, produced via parallel production.
- Senior creative directors lead every brief — no account-manager intermediary, direct Slack with the named team.
- Pricing is flat monthly with no quote-by-quote billing and no surprise invoices.
- Apparel studio capability includes a pixel-accurate-to-garment guarantee on AI-generated apparel photography.
